creator: jau@iki.fi
text:
Comment on attachment 173451
a single frame from a video witnessing the crash

Could your problem be related to what I have been seeing on a PowerMac G5
after BETA3?
BETA2 boots just fine. BETA3 panics persistently every time and always at
the exact same step during boot. The command name in the center of the image
reads "swapper".
